title: ipomoea setosa subsp. pavonii
intro: Ipomoea setosa subsp. pavonii is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae, commonly known as Morning Glory. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal medicine for its various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Ipomoea setosa subsp. pavonii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate headaches, and treat respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
